jobs.title: Senior Scientist, Tech Ops
jobs.description:
# Mansioni

Senior Scientist (Pathogen Safety)

# Descrizione

Il Senior Scientist, Tech Ops contribuisce a compiti tecnici di routine e supporta i team di progetto eseguendo funzioni specifiche come condurre esperimenti e analizzare dati per agevolare la ricerca e lo sviluppo del prodotto.

Puoi progettare e sviluppare processi di produzione per nuovi o esistenti prodotti, tenendo conto dei problemi insiti nel trasferimento della tecnologia dalla ricerca alla produzione.

Lavorerai in modo indipendente con supervisione generale per raggiungere gli obiettivi operativi con impatto diretto sui risultati del dipartimento. Inoltre, supporterai il progressione del progetto preparando rapporti e materiali per i comitati di progetto o di programma per consentire decisioni informate.

Conduci test e misurazioni durante le fasi di produzione per determinare il controllo sulle variabili applicabili e, se necessario, opererai all'interno degli attuali ambienti normativi e di conformità.

# Responsabilità principali e responsabilità

- Applica conoscenze avanzate dell'area di lavoro acquisite attraverso un titolo di studio post-laurea in scienze biologiche/biotecnologie e una vasta esperienza nello sviluppo dei processi biopharmaceutici
- Gestisce progetti/processi relativi agli studi di riduzione dei virus e, in collaborazione con stakeholder interni ed esterni rilevanti, lavora in modo indipendente con supervisione limitata
- Coaching e revisione del lavoro di professionisti di livello inferiore (Scienziati e lavoratori contingentati/servizi professionali)
- Affronta problemi difficili e talvolta complessi, che richiedono la comprensione di un insieme più ampio di questioni
- Fornisce competenze scientifiche ed expertise nel progetto e nell'applicazione degli studi di riduzione dei virus e delle attività di sviluppo del prodotto in collaborazione con altri esperti del settore all'interno e tra i team di prodotti integrati
- Garantisci la qualità nell'applicazione degli studi di riduzione dei virus per supportare gli obiettivi del progetto designati
- Contribuisci alla pianificazione, all'esecuzione, all'evaluazione e alla segnalazione degli esperimenti scientifici ai massimi livelli di integrità scientifica
- Lavorerai con e fornire expertise ad altri membri del team per raggiungere gli obiettivi di sviluppo del processo specificati entro i parametri temporali definiti

# Requisiti di qualifiche ed esperienza

- Laurea specialistica (preferibilmente PhD) in Scienze della vita (virologia, biologia cellulare, biochimica, ecc.) e almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un ambiente industriale, in particolare nell'area della scienza dei processi/sviluppo dei processi
- Proven track record nel progettare e eseguire lo sviluppo delle operazioni di base nei biopharmaceutici, preferibilmente esperienza in modelli in scala ridotta
- Background nel campo virologico o esperienza di lavoro in laboratori BSL-2, poiché il ruolo include attività manuali quotidiane utilizzando virus infettivi in laboratori di contenimento biosicuro
- Profonda esperienza nel lavoro di progetto, gestione dei compiti e competenze analitiche eccellenti
- Proven track record nella scrittura tecnica, nei sistemi e nei flussi di documentazione correlati
- Eccellenti competenze organizzative, di presentazione e comunicative (lingua inglese)

# CSL Behring

CSL Behring è un leader globale nelle bioterapie guidato dalla nostra promessa di salvare vite. Concentrandosi sul servizio alle esigenze dei pazienti utilizzando le tecnologie più recenti, scopriamo, sviluppiamo e distribuiamo terapie innovative per le persone che vivono con patologie nell'area terapeutica immunologia, ematologia, cardiovascolare e metabolica, respiratoria e trapianto. Utilizziamo tre piattaforme scientifiche strategiche di frazionamento del plasma, tecnologia delle proteine ricombinanti e terapia cellulare e genica per supportare l'innovazione continua e raffinare costantemente i modi in cui i prodotti possono affrontare le esigenze mediche non soddisfatte e aiutare i pazienti a condurre vite piene.

CSL Behring opera una delle più grandi reti di raccolta del plasma del mondo, CSL Plasma. La nostra casa madre è CSL Limited (ASX:CSL; USOTC:CSLLY). Per ulteriori informazioni sulla nostra azienda, visita [www.cslbehring.com](http://www.cslbehring.com).

descriptionByLocale.de:
Mansioni Senior Scientist (Pathogen Safety) Beschreibung: Der Senior Scientist, Tech Ops, leistet einen Beitrag zu Routinetechniken und -unterstützung im Projektteam, das spezifische Funktionen durchführt, Experimente durchführt und Daten analysiert, um die Ergebnisse zu ermitteln und das Produkt weiterzuentwickeln. Sie können Produktionsprozesse für neue oder existierende Produkte planen und weiterentwickeln, da sie mit den Problemen zu Beginn der Technologieübertragung während der Produktion konfrontiert sind. Wir arbeiten unabhängig und unter allgemeiner Aufsicht, um die 
• Aufgaben unserer Mitarbeiter direkt auf die Ergebnisse unserer Abteilung zu übertragen. Unterstützen Sie außerdem den Fortschritt des vorbereiteten Projekts und stellen Sie Berichterstatter und Materialien zusammen, um Projekt- oder Programmkommissionen zu beauftragen, um eine einvernehmliche Entscheidung zu treffen und zu informieren. Führen Sie Tests und Tests während der Produktionsphase durch, um die Kontrolle über alle anwendbaren Variablen zu bestimmen, und zwar bei Bedarf innerhalb der jeweiligen normativen und konformen Umgebung. Hauptverantwortung und Verantwortlichkeit - Anwendung, die sich vor dem Arbeitsgebiet auskennt, einen Titel eines post-laureatischen Studios in Biowissenschaften/Biotechnologie und eine umfassende Erfahrung in der Entwicklung biopharmazeutischer Prozesse erwirbt - Geständnisse bei der Entwicklung/Entwicklung relativer Studien zur Beseitigung des Virus In Zusammenarbeit mit interessierten Stakeholdern arbeite ich unabhängig und mit begrenzter Aufsicht Mehr Fragen - Verschaffen Sie sich wissenschaftliche Kompetenz und Fachwissen im Projekt und in der Anwendung der Virenbekämpfungsstudien und in der Zusammenarbeit mit der Produktentwicklung mit anderen Experten des gesamten Unternehmens und dem integrierten Produktteam - Garantieren Sie die Qualität der Anwendung Studien zur Beseitigung des Virus zur Unterstützung der Zielvorgaben des Projekts – Beiträge zur Arbeit, zur gesamten Überwachung, zur Gesamtauswertung und zum Abschluss wissenschaftlicher Experimente sowie eine große Anzahl wissenschaftlicher Integritätsarbeiten – Arbeit mit und Fachwissen von anderen Teammitgliedern, um die Zielvorschläge zu ergänzen Entwicklung spezifischer Prozesse und definierte zeitliche Parameter. Qualifikations- und Erfahrungsvoraussetzungen - Fachhochschulreife (bevorzugter Doktortitel) in der Lebenswissenschaft (Virologie, Zellbiologie, Biochemie usw.) und mehr als 3 Jahre Erfahrung in einem industriellen Umfeld, insbesondere in der Umgebung Prozesswissenschaft/Prozessentwicklung - Nachgewiesene Erfolgsbilanz bei der Entwicklung und Entwicklung von biopharmazeutischen Basisoperationen, bevorzugte Erfahrung in der Modellierung in der Skala von Ridotta - Hintergrund auf dem Gebiet der Virologie oder Erfahrung in der Arbeit in BSL-2-Laboren, wobei die Anweisungen manuelle Aktivitäten umfassen Täglicher Einsatz von Virusinfizierten in Laboratorien für Biosicherheitsinhalte - Berufserfahrung in der Projektarbeit, kompetente Kompetenz und analytische Kompetenz - Nachgewiesene Erfolgsbilanz in der Technik, System und Dokumentationsfluss - Exzellente organisatorische Kompetenz, Präsentation usw Kommunikativ (Sprache Englisch) CSL Behring CSL Behring ist ein globaler Führer in der Biotherapie, der von unserem Heilsversprechen geleitet wird. Konzentriert sich auf die Dienste aller Patienten, die in jüngster Zeit eine innovative Therapie, Untersuchung, Pflege und Vertrieb innovativer Therapien für Personen durchführen, die nicht mit Pathologien in der therapeutischen Immunologie, Ematologie, Herz-Kreislauf- und Stoffwechsel-, Atemwegs- und Atemwegserkrankungen leben. Ich nutze drei wissenschaftliche und strategische Strategien zur Herstellung von Plasma, Protein-Rekombinations- und Zelltherapie- und Genetik-Technologien, um die kontinuierliche Innovation zu unterstützen und kontinuierlich zu verfeinern, sowie Modi in unseren Produkten, die das Ziel haben, nicht verdauliche Medikamente einzunehmen und Patienten zu unterstützen Vite Piene. CSL Behring hat einen der größten Plasma-Berichte der Welt aufgeführt, CSL Plasma. Unser Mutterhaus ist CSL Limited (ASX:CSL; USOTC:CSLLY). Weitere Informationen zu unserem Standort finden Sie unter www.cslbehring.com.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Mansioni Senior Scientist (Pathogen Safety) Description Le Senior Scientist, Tech Ops contribue à un concours technique de routine et soutient l'équipe de projet en élaborant des fonctions spécifiques pour réaliser des expériences et analyser des données pour développer la recherche et le développement du produit. Vous pouvez planifier et développer les processus de production pour de nouveaux produits existants, en tenant compte des problèmes initiés dans le transfert de la technologie pour lancer la production. Je travaillerai de manière indépendante avec une supervision générale pour pouvoir travailler avec les opérateurs avec un impact direct sur les résultats du parti. En outre, je soutiens la progression du projet en préparant des rapports et du matériel pour les comités de projet ou de programme pour informer les décisions consenties. Effectuer des tests et des mises en œuvre au cours de la phase de production afin de déterminer le contrôle des variables applicables et, si nécessaire, le fonctionnement à l'intérieur des normes ambiantes actuelles et de leur conformité. Responsabilités principales et responsabilités - Appliquer la connaissance avancée du domaine de travail en acquérant un titre de studio post-lauréat en sciences biologiques/biotechnologies et une vaste expérience dans le développement des processus biopharmaceutiques - Gestes de projets/processus relatifs aux études de lutte contre les virus et, en collaboration avec les parties prenantes internes et externes pertinentes, travaille de manière indépendante avec une supervision limitée - Coaching et révision du travail des professionnels de niveau inférieur (Scienziati et laboratori contingentati/servizi professionali) - Face à des problèmes difficiles et de haute complexité, qui enrichit la compréhension d'un insieme plus ampio di questions - Assurer des compétences scientifiques et une expertise dans le projet et dans l'application des études de lutte contre les virus et les activités de développement du produit en collaboration avec d'autres experts de l'ensemble de l'interne et de l'équipe de produits intégrés - Garantisci la qualité dans l'application des études de lutte contre les virus pour soutenir les objectifs du projet désigné - Contribuer à la planification, à l'exécution, à l'évaluation et à la signalisation des expériences scientifiques avec de nombreux niveaux d'intégrité scientifique - Des travailleurs avec l'expertise d'autres membres de l'équipe pour obtenir les objectifs du processus spécifique avant Définition des paramètres temporels 
• Exigences de qualification et d'expérience - Laurea Specialistica (de préférence PhD) en sciences de la vie (virologie, biologie cellulaire, biochimie, etc.) et au moins 3 ans d'expérience dans un environnement industriel, en particulier dans le domaine de la science des processus/sviluppo des processus - Expérience avérée Pour planifier et suivre le développement des opérations de base dans les produits biopharmaceutiques, de préférence des expériences dans des modèles à l'échelle ridotta - Contexte du champ virologique ou de l'expérience de travail en laboratoire BSL-2, mais les règles incluent des activités manuelles utilisant quotidiennement des virus dans les laboratoires de stockage. biosicuro - Expérience approfondie dans le travail de projet, la gestion des compétitions et des compétences analytiques excellentes - Expérience avérée dans l'écriture technique, dans les systèmes et dans les flussi de documentation corrélative - Compétences exceptionnelles en matière d'organisation, de présentation et de communication (lingue anglaise) CSL Behring CSL Behring est un leader mondial Dans notre guide de biothérapie, notre promesse de sauvetage est rapide. Nous nous concentrons sur les services à l'attention des patients utilisant la technologie la plus récente, la recherche, la formation et la distribution de thérapies innovantes pour les personnes vivant avec des pathologies dans le domaine thérapeutique, immunologique, ématologique, cardio-vasculaire et métabolique, respiratoire et pathologique. Nous utilisons une méthode scientifique stratégique de fractionnement du plasma, la technologie des protéines ricombinantes et de la thérapie cellulaire et génétique pour soutenir l'innovation continue et perfectionner constamment les modifications dans les produits et les produits qui peuvent affronter les exigences médicales non saturées et aider les patients à vivre vite. CSL Behring a réalisé l'un des plus grands succès de la collecte du plasma du monde, CSL Plasma. Notre maison mère est CSL Limited (ASX:CSL; USOTC:CSLLY). Pour plus d’informations sur notre entreprise, visitez www.cslbehring.com.

jobs.title: Director, Commercial and Medical Operations IT Product Manager

titleByLocale.it: Direttore, Commercial and Medical Operations IT Product Manager
titleByLocale.en: Director, Commercial and Medical Operations IT Product Manager
titleByLocale.de: Direktor, IT-Produktmanager für kommerzielle und medizinische Operationen
titleByLocale.fr: Directeur, Responsable Produit IT pour les Opérations Commerciales et Médicales

jobs.description:
# Director, Commercial and Medical Operations IT Product Manager

## Mansioni

- **Lead the design and delivery of platforms** for revenue management, contracting, pricing, compliance, meetings, training and other operational domains. Ensure seamless integration with enterprise systems and compliance with regulatory requirements. Enable decision intelligence across commercial and medical operations by integrating data, analytics, and workflow platforms that support compliant, scalable execution.
- **Develop and communicate a strategic product vision**, integrating digital, data, automation and AI capabilities to future-proof operations. Partner with executive stakeholders to identify opportunities for digital transformation and innovation.
- **Act as a platform steward**, accountable for long-term architectural integrity, scalability, and cost efficiency—balancing near-term business needs with enterprise standards and future-state evolution.
- **Manage the full end-to-end product lifecycle**, prioritizing features based on business impact, user feedback and emerging technology trends.
- **Ensure robust API integration**, adherence to interoperability standards, and implementation of data governance practices to deliver scalable, secure, and compliant solutions.
- **Serve as the primary liaison between business units and IT**, translating requirements into actionable, secure, and compliant solutions. Serve as a senior technology leader embedded with the business units, IT functions, anticipating needs and turning requirements into actionable, secure, and compliant digital products.
- **Own the responsible evaluation, adoption, and scaling of AI and advanced analytics capabilities**—partnering with Data, Security, Legal, and business leadership to operationalize AI in compliant, high-value use cases.
- **Develop and manage strategic relationships with external technology and managed services partners** to ensure seamless integration, compliance, and innovation across platforms
- **Own product financials** including vendor strategy, run vs. grow investment decisions, total cost of ownership, and value realization tracking in partnership with Finance and Procurement.
- **Build and develop agile, cross-functional teams**, fostering a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous learning
- **Define and evolve delivery models** (product-aligned teams, DevOps, vendor/partner orchestration) to improve speed, quality, and accountability across global teams.
- **Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs)** to measure product performance, business impact, and regulatory compliance.
- **Ensure platforms meet global regulatory, privacy, and cybersecurity standards**.
- **Stay ahead of industry trends, regulatory changes, technology innovations, proactively adapting strategies**.
- **Drive continuous improvement** in productivity, adoption, compliance, and business outcomes—not output alone.

## Rapporti gerarchici

- Reports To: Executive Director, Commercial I&T
- Direct Reports: Product Owners, Platform Configuration/Analysts

## Requisiti

- Proven experience in a similar role, with a strong track record of delivering innovative, scalable, and compliant technology solutions.
- Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional teams and manage product lifecycles.
- Deep understanding of commercial and medical operations, with experience in revenue management, contracting, pricing, compliance, meetings, and training domains.
- Strong business acumen and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts into actionable business solutions.
- Experience with AI, advanced analytics, and data governance practices.
- Proven ability to manage product financials, including vendor strategy, investment decisions, and value realization tracking.
- Experience with agile methodologies and delivery models (product-aligned teams, DevOps, vendor/partner orchestration).
- Strong leadership skills, with the ability to build and develop high-performing teams.
- Excellent communication and influencing skills, with the ability to drive change and influence stakeholders at all levels.
- Bachelor's degree in a relevant field; advanced degree (MBA, MS) preferred.

## Cosa offriamo

- A challenging and rewarding role in a dynamic and growing organization.
- The opportunity to drive enterprise-wide business transformation through digital platforms, data, and AI.
- A competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
- A collaborative and inclusive work environment that values diversity and fosters continuous learning and growth.

## Contatto

Per candidarsi, inviare il proprio curriculum vitae e una lettera di motivazione all'indirizzo [email address] o utilizzare il modulo di candidatura online sul nostro sito web.

• Anforderungen in handlungsfähige, sichere und konforme Lösungen überträgt. Servieren Sie als führender Technologieführer, der mit den Business Units, IT-Funktionen eingebettet ist, die Bedürfnisse zu antizipieren und 
• Anforderungen in handlungsfähige, sichere und konforme digitale Produkte zu verwandeln. - Ja. • Cosa offriamo - Eine herausfordernde und lohnende Rolle in einer dynamischen und wachsenden Organisation. - Ja. Die Möglichkeit, unternehmensweite Unternehmenstransformation durch digitale Plattformen, Daten und KI voranzutreiben - ein wettbewerbsfähiges Gehalt und umfassendes Nutzenpaket. - Ein kollaboratives und integratives Arbeitsumfeld, das Vielfalt schätzt und kontinuierliches Lernen und Wachstum fördert. descriptionByLocale.fr:
Directeur, Opérations commerciales et médicales Gestionnaire de produits TI Mansioni - Diriger la conception et la prestation de plateformes pour la gestion des revenus, la passation de marchés, les prix, la conformité, les réunions, la formation et d'autres domaines opérationnels. Assurer une intégration harmonieuse avec les systèmes d'entreprise et la conformité aux exigences réglementaires. Permettre l'intelligence de décision dans les opérations commerciales et médicales en intégrant les données, les analyses et les plates-formes de workflow qui supportent l'exécution conforme et évolutive. - Développer et communiquer une vision stratégique du produit, intégrant les capacités numériques, de données, d'automatisation et d'IA aux opérations à l'épreuve de l'avenir. Établir des partenariats avec les intervenants exécutifs pour cerner les possibilités de transformation et d'innovation numériques. - Agir en tant qu'intendant de plate-forme, responsable de l'intégrité architecturale à long terme, de l'évolutivité et de la rentabilité, en conciliant les besoins à court terme des entreprises avec les normes d'entreprise et l'évolution de l'état futur. - Gérer le cycle de vie complet des produits de bout en bout, hiérarchiser les caractéristiques en fonction de l'impact commercial, de la rétroaction des utilisateurs et des nouvelles tendances technologiques. - Assurer une solide intégration des API, le respect des normes d'interopérabilité et la mise en œuvre de pratiques de gouvernance des données pour fournir des solutions évolutives, sûres et conformes. - Servir de liaison principale entre les unités opérationnelles et les TI, transformant les exigences en solutions actionnables, sécurisées et conformes. Servir de leader technologique senior intégré aux unités opérationnelles, les fonctions informatiques, l'anticipation des besoins et la transformation des exigences en des produits numériques actionnables, sécurisés et conformes. - Oui. Posséder l'évaluation responsable, l'adoption et l'échelle des capacités d'IA et des capacités d'analyse avancées – en partenariat avec Data, Security, Legal et Business Leadership pour rendre l'IA opérationnelle dans des cas d'utilisation conformes et de grande valeur. - Développer et gérer des relations stratégiques avec des partenaires externes en matière de technologie et de services gérés afin d'assurer une intégration, une conformité et une innovation harmonieuses entre les plateformes. - Créer et développer des équipes agiles et interfonctionnelles, favorisant une culture de l'innovation, de la responsabilisation et de l'apprentissage continu - Définir et développer des modèles de prestation (équipes alignées sur les produits, DevOps, orchestre fournisseur/partenaire) afin d'améliorer la rapidité, la qualité et la responsabilisation entre les équipes mondiales. - Établir et surveiller des indicateurs de rendement clés (ICP) pour mesurer le rendement des produits, l'impact des activités et la conformité à la réglementation. - Veiller à ce que les plateformes respectent les normes mondiales en matière de réglementation, de protection de la vie privée et de cybersécurité. - Restez en avance sur les tendances de l'industrie, les changements réglementaires, les innovations technologiques, l'adaptation proactive des stratégies. - Favoriser l'amélioration continue de la productivité, de l'adoption, de la conformité et des résultats opérationnels, et non pas seulement la production. Rapporti gerarchici - Rapports À : Directeur exécutif, I & T commerciale - Rapports directs : Propriétaires de produits, Configuration de la plate-forme/Analystes 
• Requisiti - Expérience éprouvée dans un rôle similaire, avec une solide expérience de la prestation de solutions technologiques innovantes, évolutives et conformes. - Capacité démontrée de diriger des équipes interfonctionnelles et de gérer les cycles de vie des produits. - Compréhension approfondie des opérations commerciales et médicales, avec une expérience dans la gestion des recettes, les contrats, les prix, la conformité, les réunions et les domaines de formation. - Des compétences solides en gestion des entreprises et des parties prenantes, avec la capacité de traduire des concepts techniques complexes en solutions d'affaires réalisables. - Expérience des pratiques d'IA, d'analyse avancée et de gouvernance des données. - Capacité éprouvée de gérer les finances des produits, y compris la stratégie des fournisseurs, les décisions d'investissement et le suivi de la valorisation. - Expérience des méthodologies agiles et des modèles de livraison (équipes alignées sur les produits, DevOps, orchestre fournisseur/partenaire). - De solides compétences en leadership, avec la capacité de créer et de développer des équipes performantes. - Excellente communication et influence des compétences, avec la capacité de stimuler le changement et d'influencer les intervenants à tous les niveaux. - Baccalauréat dans un domaine pertinent; diplôme avancé (MBA, MS) préféré. 
• Cosa offriamo - Un rôle stimulant et gratifiant dans une organisation dynamique et croissante. - Oui. L'occasion de stimuler la transformation des activités à l'échelle de l'entreprise par le biais de plateformes numériques, de données et d'IA. - Un salaire concurrentiel et un ensemble complet d'avantages. - Un milieu de travail collaboratif et inclusif qui valorise la diversité et favorise l'apprentissage et la croissance continus. Contatto Per candidarsi, inviare il proprio curriculum vitae e una lettera di motivazione all'indirizzo [adresse e-mail] o usingzare il modulo di candidatura online sul nostro sito web.

# Director, Field Engagement IT Product Manager

## Mansioni

- **Lead** the design, delivery, and continuous improvement of platforms and solutions optimizing field experience and productivity through integrated CRM, engagement data, and analytics capabilities – balancing simplicity, compliance, and effectiveness.
- **Define** and communicate a forward-looking product vision and roadmap, leveraging AI, automation, and advanced analytics to unlock new business opportunities. Partner with executive stakeholders to identify opportunities for digital transformation and innovation.
- **Act** as a platform steward, accountable for long-term architectural integrity, scalability, and cost efficiency—balancing near-term business needs with enterprise standards and future-state evolution.
- **Manage** the full end-to-end product lifecycle, prioritizing features based on business impact, user feedback, and emerging technology trends.
- **Ensure** robust API integration, adherence to interoperability standards, and implementation of data governance practices to deliver scalable, secure, and compliant solutions.
- **Serve** as a senior technology leader embedded with the business units, IT functions, anticipating needs and turning requirements into actionable, secure, and compliant digital products.
- **Own** the responsible evaluation, adoption, and scaling of AI and advanced analytics capabilities—partnering with Data, Security, Legal, and business leadership to operationalize AI in compliant, high-value use cases.
- **Develop** and manage strategic relationships with external technology and managed services partners to ensure seamless integration, compliance, and innovation across platforms.
- **Own** product financials including vendor strategy, run vs. grow investment decisions, total cost of ownership, and value realization tracking in partnership with Finance and Procurement.
- **Build** and mentor high-performing, cross-functional teams, championing agile, DevOps, and user-centric design practices.
- **Define** and evolve delivery models (product-aligned teams, DevOps, vendor/partner orchestration) to improve speed, quality, and accountability across global teams.
- **Establish** and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success, business impact, user adoption, and regulatory compliance.
- **Ensure** platforms meet global regulatory, privacy, and cybersecurity standards.
- **Stay** ahead of industry trends, regulatory changes, technology innovations, proactively adapting strategies.
- **Drive** continuous improvement, operational excellence, and change management initiatives.
- **Serve** as a trusted advisor to executive leadership, shaping strategic decisions through data-driven insights, tradeoff analysis, and forward-looking recommendations.

## Requisiti

- **Education**: Bachelor’s or advanced degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
- **Experience**: 10+ years experience in product management.

## Rapporti di Lavoro

- **Reports To**: Executive Director, Commercial I&T
- **Direct Reports**: Product Owners, Platform Configuration/Analysts

Direttore, Field Engagement IT Product Manager Mansioni - Condurre la progettazione, la consegna e il miglioramento continuo di piattaforme e soluzioni ottimizzando l'esperienza e la produttività del campo attraverso CRM integrato, dati di engagement e funzionalità di analisi – bilanciando semplicità, conformità e efficacia. - Definire e comunicare una visione e una roadmap di prodotto dall'aspetto avanzato, sfruttando l'IA, l'automazione e l'analisi avanzata per sbloccare nuove opportunità di business. Partner con le parti interessate esecutive per identificare le opportunità di trasformazione e innovazione digitale. - Agire come amministratore di piattaforma, responsabile per l'integrità architettonica a lungo termine, la scalabilità e l'efficienza dei costi, equilibrando le esigenze aziendali a breve termine con gli standard aziendali e l'evoluzione dello stato futuro. - Gestisci il ciclo di vita completo del prodotto end-to-end, dando priorità alle funzionalità basate su impatto aziendale, feedback degli utenti e tendenze tecnologiche emergenti. - Assicurare un'integrazione API robusta, rispettare gli standard di interoperabilità e implementare le pratiche di governance dei dati per fornire soluzioni scalabili, sicure e conformi. - Servire come leader tecnologico senior integrato con le unità aziendali, le funzioni IT, anticipando le esigenze e trasformando i requisiti in prodotti digitali attuabili, sicuri e conformi. - Proprio la valutazione responsabile, l'adozione e lo scaling di AI e le capacità di analisi avanzate, in collaborazione con Data, Sicurezza, Legale e leadership aziendale per operare in casi di utilizzo conformi e di alto valore. - Sviluppare e gestire relazioni strategiche con i partner di tecnologia esterna e servizi gestiti per garantire un'integrazione senza soluzione di continuità, conformità e innovazione su piattaforme. - No. Finanze di prodotto propri, tra cui strategia di fornitore, eseguire vs. crescere decisioni di investimento, il costo totale di proprietà e il monitoraggio della realizzazione del valore in collaborazione con Finanza e appalti. - Costruire e mentore team altamente performanti, cross-funzionali, campione agile, DevOps e pratiche di design user-centric. - Definire ed evolvere i modelli di consegna (gruppi allineati al prodotto, DevOps, orchestrazione fornitore/partner) per migliorare la velocità, la qualità e la responsabilità tra le squadre globali. - Stabilire e monitorare gli indicatori chiave delle prestazioni (KPI) per misurare il successo del prodotto, l'impatto aziendale, l'adozione degli utenti e la conformità alle normative. - Assicurare che le piattaforme soddisfino gli standard di regolamentazione, privacy e sicurezza informatica globali. - Rimanere al passo con le tendenze del settore, i cambiamenti normativi, le innovazioni tecnologiche, adattando attivamente le strategie. - Promuovere il miglioramento continuo, l'eccellenza operativa e le iniziative di gestione dei cambiamenti. - Servire come consulente di fiducia per la leadership esecutiva, modellare le decisioni strategiche attraverso informazioni basate sui dati, analisi dei tradeoff e raccomandazioni previsionali. 
• Requisiti - Istruzione: laurea o grado avanzato in Informatica, Ingegneria, Sistemi Informativi, o campo relativo. - Esperienza: 10+ anni di esperienza nella gestione dei prodotti. Rapporti di Lavoro - Rapporti A: Direttore Esecutivo, Commercial I&T - Resoconti diretti: Proprietari del Prodotto, Configurazione della Piattaforma/Analisti Contatto (No informazioni di contatto fornite nel testo originale)
descriptionByLocale.en:
Director, Field Engagement IT Product Manager

Mansioni

- Lead the design, delivery, and continuous improvement of platforms and solutions optimizing field experience and productivity through integrated CRM, engagement data, and analytics capabilities – balancing simplicity, compliance, and effectiveness.
- Define and communicate a forward-looking product vision and roadmap, leveraging AI, automation, and advanced analytics to unlock new business opportunities. Partner with executive stakeholders to identify opportunities for digital transformation and innovation.
- Act as a platform steward, accountable for long-term architectural integrity, scalability, and cost efficiency—balancing near-term business needs with enterprise standards and future-state evolution.
- Manage the full end-to-end product lifecycle, prioritizing features based on business impact, user feedback, and emerging technology trends.
- Ensure robust API integration, adherence to interoperability standards, and implementation of data governance practices to deliver scalable, secure, and compliant solutions.
- Serve as a senior technology leader embedded with the business units, IT functions, anticipating needs and turning requirements into actionable, secure, and compliant digital products.
- Own the responsible evaluation, adoption, and scaling of AI and advanced analytics capabilities—partnering with Data, Security, Legal, and business leadership to operationalize AI in compliant, high-value use cases.
- Develop and manage strategic relationships with external technology and managed services partners to ensure seamless integration, compliance, and innovation across platforms.
- Own product financials including vendor strategy, run vs. grow investment decisions, total cost of ownership, and value realization tracking in partnership with Finance and Procurement.
- Build and mentor high-performing, cross-functional teams, championing agile, DevOps, and user-centric design practices.
- Define and evolve delivery models (product-aligned teams, DevOps, vendor/partner orchestration) to improve speed, quality, and accountability across global teams.
- Establish and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success, business impact, user adoption, and regulatory compliance.
- Ensure platforms meet global regulatory, privacy, and cybersecurity standards.
- Stay ahead of industry trends, regulatory changes, technology innovations, proactively adapting strategies.
- Drive continuous improvement, operational excellence, and change management initiatives.
- Serve as a trusted advisor to executive leadership, shaping strategic decisions through data-driven insights, tradeoff analysis, and forward-looking recommendations.

Requisiti

- Education: Bachelor’s or advanced degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field.
- Experience: 10+ years experience in product management.

Rapporti di Lavoro

- Reports To: Executive Director, Commercial I&T
- Direct Reports: Product Owners, Platform Configuration/Analysts

Contatto

(No contact information provided in the original text)

jobs.title: Head of Manufacturing Engineering & Maintenance

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Ingegneria di Produzione e Manutenzione
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable Ingénierie de Fabrication et Maintenance

jobs.description:
## Descrizione

For our CSL Behring Operations / Manufacturing, we are looking for a Head of Manufacturing Engineering and Maintenance

Closing Date for Applications – 17th April 2026

The Head of Manufacturing Engineering & Maintenance is a strategic leader responsible for the reliability and lifecycle management of manufacturing assets. This role oversees Calibration & Metrology Engineering, Manufacturing Maintenance, Reliability Engineering, Production/System Owner Engineering, and Shutdown Planning & Scheduling. Key responsibilities support critical operations, including fractionation, bulk production, and packaging, while ensuring equipment readiness and compliance with regulatory standards in the biopharmaceutical sector. The position also requires strong skills in labour relations to foster collaboration within a unionized workforce.
Role that this position reports to: Engineering & Maintenance Site Head

## Job Purpose

- Direct all aspects of manufacturing engineering and maintenance, including technical support, project management, emergency response, on-call, troubleshooting and corrective, preventive/predictive maintenance
- Ensure facilities and equipment are designed, operated and maintained in compliance with cGMP, Health Authorities (i.e. FDA), EHS
- Drives execution of qualification plans, risk analysis, metrology, data integrity and general GMP issues
- Lead the planning, budgeting, execution and commissioning of major capital projects, facility expansions, and technology upgrades
- Champion asset lifecycle management, reliability engineering and implementation
- Oversees sites workshop operations
- Develop, communicate and execute an engineering and maintenance strategy
- Lead transformation initiatives, including digitalization, advanced automation, sustainability and adoption of cutting-edge manufacturing technologies
- Supports the development and implementation of multi-year strategic plans, capital investment roadmaps and operational readiness programs for all global site
- Lead the sites manufacturing engineering and maintenance organization
- Oversee deviation management, investigation of deviations and establishment of corrective and preventive actions plus develop, monitor and report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for engineering and maintenance
- Represent the local manufacturing engineering and maintenance function in regulatory inspections, audit readiness
- Champion the use of digital tools and data analytics (e.g., SAP, Trackwise, FMS, Ariba, Power BI, Smart Sheet, Tableau) and implement CSL Operating System, Six Sigma, Lean
- Conducts regular GEMBAS
- Oversee the management of GMP/non-GMP facility systems
- Manage relationships with external service providers, contractors and vendors
- Partner with Manufacturing, Quality, EHS, Supply Chain, IT and other departments
- Engage with global and regional leadership
- Lead, mentor and develop a diverse, cross-functional team
- Oversees assigned cost centres, monitors performances and acts on trends
- Develops budgets for OpEx and headcounts

## Your Skills and Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in engineering (Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical) required, a master’s preferred
- Minimum of ten years’ experience in the pharmaceutical, food, or chemical process industry
- At least five years of technical management or leadership experience
- Significant expertise in GMP/non-GMP manufacturing assets related to pharmaceutical production
- Expertise in sterile manufacturing, bulk production and finishing and packaging operations of (bio) pharmaceuticals
- Experience managing union and non-union workforces
- Advanced skills in facility management systems (Trackwise, SAP, FMS, Ariba, DCMS) and digital tools (MS Project, Excel, Power BI, Smart Sheet, Tableau)
- Knowledge of Six Sigma/Lean principles
- Financial acumen in managing multimillion-dollar budgets
- Experience with global health authorities’ inspections, audits and regulatory agencies

We lo

Questo ruolo supervisiona la calibrazione e l'ingegneria della metrologia, la manutenzione di fabbricazione, l'ingegneria di affidabilità, l'ingegneria del proprietario di produzione/sistema e la pianificazione di shutdown & Scheduling. Le responsabilità chiave supportano le operazioni critiche, tra cui frazionamento, produzione di massa e imballaggio, garantendo al tempo stesso la disponibilità di attrezzature e il rispetto degli standard normativi nel settore biofarmaceutico. La posizione richiede anche forti competenze nei rapporti di lavoro per favorire la collaborazione all'interno di una forza lavoro unificata. descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Pour notre CSL Behring Operations / Manufacturing, nous sommes à la recherche d'un responsable de l'ingénierie et de la maintenance de fabrication Date de clôture pour les applications – 17 avril 2026 Le responsable de l'ingénierie et de la maintenance de fabrication est un leader stratégique responsable de la fiabilité et de la gestion du cycle de vie des actifs de fabrication. Ce rôle supervise l'ingénierie de l'étalonnage et de la métrologie, l'entretien de la fabrication, l'ingénierie de la fiabilité, l'ingénierie de la production et du propriétaire du système, et la planification et l'établissement du calendrier d'arrêt. Les responsabilités clés soutiennent les opérations essentielles, y compris le fractionnement, la production en vrac et l'emballage, tout en assurant la préparation de l'équipement et la conformité aux normes réglementaires dans le secteur biopharmaceutique. Le poste exige également de solides compétences en relations de travail pour favoriser la collaboration au sein d'un effectif syndiqué. Fonctions d'entretien et d'entretien du site Objet de la table - Diriger tous les aspects de l'ingénierie et de l'entretien de la fabrication, y compris le soutien technique, la gestion de projet, l'intervention en cas d'urgence, le dépannage et l'entretien correctif, préventif et préventif - S'assurer que les installations et l'équipement sont conçus, exploités et entretenus conformément au GMPc, aux autorités sanitaires (c.-à-d. la FDA), à l'ESM - Diriger l'exécution des plans de qualification, l'analyse des risques, la métrologie, l'intégrité des données et les questions générales de BPF - Diriger la planification, la budgétisation, l'exécution et la mise en service des grands projets d'immobilisations, des expansions d'installations et des mises à niveau technologiques - Gestion du cycle de vie des actifs champions, de l'ingénierie de la fiabilité et de la mise en oeuvre - Superviser les activités d'ingénierie et d'entretien du site - Superviser la gestion des écarts et l'établissement d'actions correctives et préventives ainsi que l'élaboration de plans stratégiques, surveiller et d'utilisation Au moins cinq ans d'expérience en gestion technique ou en leadership - Expertise importante en actifs de fabrication de BPF/non-BPF liés à la production pharmaceutique - Expertise en fabrication stérile, en fabrication en vrac, en finition et en conditionnement de produits pharmaceutiques (bio) - Expérience en gestion de la main-d'oeuvre syndicale et non syndicale - Compétences avancées en systèmes de gestion des installations (Trackwise, SAP, FMS, Ariba, DCMS) et outils numériques (MS Project, Excel, Power BI, Smart Sheet, Tableau) - Connaissance des six principes Sigma/Lean - Abondance financière dans la gestion de budgets de plusieurs millions de dollars - Expérience avec les autorités sanitaires mondiales - Inspections, vérifications et organismes de réglementation Nous sommes

jobs.title: Director, Process Development
jobs.description:
For our global Technical Operations Organization, we are currently looking for a

## Descrizione

Director, Process Development

The Director of Process Development leads the design, development, and scale-up of bioprocesses for biologics manufacturing. This role provides strategic and technical leadership to ensure robust, scalable, and compliant upstream and downstream processes across the product lifecycle, from early development to commercial production.

## Mansioni

Bioprocess Development Leadership

- Lead development of Albumin downstream (purification) processes​
- Define process strategies to optimize yield, quality, and scalability​
- Establish critical process parameters (CPPs) and critical quality attributes (CQAs)

Scale-Up & Technology Transfer

- Oversee scale-up from lab to pilot and commercial manufacturing​
- Lead technology transfer to manufacturing sites and external partners (CMOs/CDMOs)​
- Ensure process consistency and robustness across scales and sites

Scientific & Technical Strategy

- Provide expertise in biologics production systems (e.g., CHO, microbial systems, viral vectors)​
- Drive innovation and adoption of new bioprocessing technologies​
- Lead troubleshooting and resolution of complex process challenges

Regulatory & Compliance

- Ensure compliance with GMP and global regulatory expectations​
- Support regulatory submissions (IND, BLA/MAA) with process development data​
- Act as SME during inspections and audits

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Partner with MS&T, Manufacturing, Analytical Development, Quality, and Regulatory teams​
- Align process strategies with product and portfolio goals

Leadership & Organizational Development

- Lead and mentor multidisciplinary teams (scientists, engineers) 
- Manage budgets, resources, and project priorities 
- Build a high-performing, innovative team culture

Lifecycle Management & Continuous Improvement

- Support process validation and continued process verification (CPV)​
- Drive process optimization using data analytics and statistical tools (DOE, multivariate analysis)​
- Implement improvements post-commercialization

## Requisiti

Your experience

- PhD (preferred) or Master’s in Biotechnology, Biochemical/Chemical Engineering, or related field 
- 12–18+ years of experience in bioprocess or biologics development 
- Strong expertise in downstream processing 
- Proven experience in scale-up, tech transfer, and commercial manufacturing support 
- Deep understanding of GMP and regulatory frameworks (FDA, EMA) 
- Demonstrated leadership and team management experience 
- Understanding plasma process development preferable

Key Skills

- Deep technical expertise in bioprocessing​
- Strategic leadership and decision-making​
- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills​
- Cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management​
- Innovation and continuous improvement mindset

## Contatto

Are you interested? We are looking forward to receiving your online application.

About CSL Behring
CSL Behring is a global biotherapeutics leader driven by our promise to save lives. Focused on serving patients’ needs by using the latest technologies, we discover, develop and deliver innovative therapies for people living with conditions in the immunology, hematology, cardiovascular and metabolic, respiratory, and transplant therapeutic areas. We use three strategic scientific platforms of plasma fractionation, recombinant protein technology, and cell and gene therapy to support continued innovation and continually refine ways in which products can address unmet medical needs and help patients lead full lives.

CSL Behring operates one of the world’s largest plasma collection networks, CSL Plasma. Our parent company, CSL, headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, employs 32,000 people, and delivers its lifesaving therapies to people in more than 100 countries.
To learn more about CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus and CSL Vifor visit https://www.csl.com/ and CSL Pl

descriptionByLocale.it:
Per la nostra organizzazione operativa tecnica globale, stiamo attualmente cercando un Descrizione Direttore, Sviluppo dei processi Il Direttore dello sviluppo dei processi guida la progettazione, lo sviluppo e l'ampliamento dei bioprocessi per la produzione di prodotti biologici. Questo ruolo fornisce leadership strategica e tecnica per garantire processi a monte e a valle robusti, scalabili e conformi durante l'intero ciclo di vita del prodotto, dallo sviluppo iniziale alla produzione commerciale. Mansioni Bioprocess Development Leadership - Guidare lo sviluppo dei processi downstream (purificazione) dell'albumina - Definire strategie di processo per ottimizzare resa, qualità e scalabilità - Stabilire parametri critici di processo (CPP) e attributi critici di qualità (CQA) Scale-Up e trasferimento tecnologico - Supervisionare lo scale-up dal laboratorio alla produzione pilota e commerciale - Guidare il trasferimento di tecnologia a siti di produzione e partner esterni (CMO/CDMO) - Garantire coerenza e robustezza del processo su scale e siti Strategia scientifica e tecnica - Fornire competenze in sistemi di produzione di prodotti biologici (ad es. CHO, sistemi microbici, vettori virali)​ - Promuovere l'innovazione e l'adozione di nuove tecnologie di bioprocessamento​ - Guidare la risoluzione dei problemi e la risoluzione di sfide di processo complesse Normative e conformità - Garantire la conformità con GMP e aspettative normative globali​ - Supportare le richieste normative (IND, BLA/MAA) con dati di sviluppo dei processi​ - Agire come PMI durante ispezioni e audit Collaborazione interfunzionale - Collaborare con team MS&T, produzione, sviluppo analitico, qualità e regolamentazione​ - Allineare le strategie di processo con gli obiettivi di prodotto e portafoglio Leadership e sviluppo organizzativo - Guidare e guidare team multidisciplinari (scienziati, ingegneri) - Gestire budget, risorse e priorità di progetto - Costruire una cultura di squadra innovativa e ad alte prestazioni Gestione del ciclo di vita e miglioramento continuo - Supportare la convalida del processo e la verifica continua del processo (CPV)​ - Promuovere l'ottimizzazione del processo utilizzando strumenti statistici e di analisi dei dati (DOE, analisi multivariata)​ - Implementare miglioramenti post-commercializzazione 
• Requisiti La tua esperienza - Dottorato di ricerca (preferito) o master in Biotecnologia, ingegneria biochimica/chimica o campo correlato - 12-18+ anni di esperienza nello sviluppo di bioprocessi o prodotti biologici - Forte esperienza nella lavorazione a valle - Comprovata esperienza nello scale-up, nel trasferimento tecnologico e nel supporto alla produzione commerciale - Profonda conoscenza delle GMP e dei quadri normativi (FDA, EMA) - Dimostrata esperienza di leadership e di gestione del team - È preferibile comprendere lo sviluppo del processo al plasma Competenze chiave - Profonda competenza tecnica nella bioprocessazione​ - Leadership strategica e processo decisionale​ - Forti capacità analitiche e di risoluzione dei problemi​ - Collaborazione interfunzionale e gestione degli stakeholder​ - Mentalità di innovazione e miglioramento continuo Contatto Sei interessato? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura online. Informazioni su CSL Behring CSL Behring è un leader globale nel campo della bioterapia guidato dalla nostra promessa di salvare vite umane. Concentrati nel soddisfare le esigenze dei pazienti utilizzando le tecnologie più recenti, scopriamo, sviluppiamo e forniamo terapie innovative per le persone che vivono con patologie nelle aree terapeutiche immunologica, ematologica, cardiovascolare e metabolica, respiratoria e dei trapianti. Utilizziamo tre piattaforme scientifiche strategiche di frazionamento del plasma, tecnologia delle proteine ​​ricombinanti e terapia cellulare e genica per supportare l'innovazione continua e perfezionare continuamente le modalità con cui i prodotti possono rispondere alle esigenze mediche insoddisfatte e aiutare i pazienti a condurre una vita piena. CSL Behring gestisce una delle reti di raccolta di plasma più grandi al mondo, CSL Plasma. La nostra società madre, CSL, con sede a Melbourne, in Australia, impiega 32.000 persone e fornisce le sue terapie salvavita a persone in più di 100 paesi. Per saperne di più su CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus e CSL Vifor visitare https://www.csl.com/ e CSL Pl

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Pour notre organisation mondiale des opérations techniques, nous recherchons actuellement un directeur du développement des procédés. Le directeur du développement des procédés dirige la conception, le développement et la mise à l'échelle des bioprocédés pour la fabrication de produits biologiques. Ce rôle fournit un leadership stratégique et technique pour garantir des processus en amont et en aval robustes, évolutifs et conformes tout au long du cycle de vie du produit, du développement initial à la production commerciale. Mansioni Bioprocess Development Leadership - Diriger le développement des processus d'albumine en aval (purification) - Définir des stratégies de processus pour optimiser le rendement, la qualité et l'évolutivité - Établir les paramètres critiques du processus (CPP) et les attributs critiques de qualité (CQA) Mise à l'échelle et transfert de technologie - Superviser la mise à l'échelle du laboratoire à la fabrication pilote et commerciale - Diriger le transfert de technologie vers les sites de fabrication et les partenaires externes (CMO/CDMO) - Assurer la cohérence et la robustesse des processus à toutes les échelles et sur les sites. Stratégie scientifique et technique - Fournir expertise dans les systèmes de production de produits biologiques (par exemple, CHO, systèmes microbiens, vecteurs viraux)​ - Stimuler l'innovation et l'adoption de nouvelles technologies de bioprocédés​ - Diriger le dépannage et la résolution de défis de processus complexes Réglementation et conformité - Assurer la conformité aux BPF et aux attentes réglementaires mondiales​ - Soutenir les soumissions réglementaires (IND, BLA/MAA) avec les données de développement de processus​ - Agir en tant qu'SME lors des inspections et des audits Collaboration interfonctionnelle - Collaborer avec MS&T, la fabrication, le développement analytique, la qualité et la réglementation - Aligner les stratégies de processus avec les objectifs des produits et du portefeuille Leadership et développement organisationnel - Diriger et encadrer des équipes multidisciplinaires (scientifiques, ingénieurs) - Gérer les budgets, les ressources et les priorités des projets - Construire une culture d'équipe performante et innovante Gestion du cycle de vie et amélioration continue - Soutenir la validation et la vérification continue des processus (CPV) - Piloter l'optimisation des processus à l'aide d'outils d'analyse de données et de statistiques (DOE, analyse multivariée) - Mettre en œuvre des améliorations après la commercialisation 
• Requisiti Votre expérience - PhD (de préférence) ou Master en biotechnologie, génie biochimique/chimique ou dans un domaine connexe - 12 à 18 ans et plus d'expérience dans le développement de bioprocédés ou de produits biologiques - Forte expertise dans le traitement en aval - Expérience avérée en matière de mise à l'échelle, de transfert de technologie et de soutien à la fabrication commerciale - Compréhension approfondie des BPF et des cadres réglementaires (FDA, EMA) - Expérience démontrée en leadership et en gestion d'équipe - Comprendre le développement de procédés plasma de préférence Compétences clés - Expertise technique approfondie en bioprocédés - Leadership stratégique et prise de décision - Solide capacité à résoudre des problèmes et compétences analytiques - Collaboration interfonctionnelle et gestion des parties prenantes - Esprit d'innovation et d'amélioration continue Contatto Etes-vous intéressé ? Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature en ligne. À propos de CSL Behring CSL Behring est un leader mondial des biothérapeutiques animé par notre promesse de sauver des vies. Axés sur la satisfaction des besoins des patients en utilisant les dernières technologies, nous découvrons, développons et proposons des thérapies innovantes pour les personnes vivant avec des maladies dans les domaines thérapeutiques de l’immunologie, de l’hématologie, des maladies cardiovasculaires et métaboliques, respiratoires et de transplantation. Nous utilisons trois plates-formes scientifiques stratégiques de fractionnement du plasma, de technologie des protéines recombinantes et de thérapie cellulaire et génique pour soutenir l'innovation continue et affiner continuellement les moyens par lesquels les produits peuvent répondre à des besoins médicaux non satisfaits et aider les patients à mener une vie bien remplie. CSL Behring exploite l’un des plus grands réseaux de collecte de plasma au monde, CSL Plasma. Notre société mère, CSL, dont le siège social est situé à Melbourne, en Australie, emploie 32 000 personnes et propose ses thérapies vitales à des personnes dans plus de 100 pays. Pour en savoir plus sur CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus et CSL Vifor, visitez https://www.csl.com/ et CSL Pl

jobs.title: Principal Scientist, CMC Science
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

The Principle Scientist, CMC Science is responsible for supporting and executing Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls (CMC) strategies for pharmaceutical and/or biologic products across clinical development and early commercialization. This role ensures that drug substance and drug product development activities meet regulatory, quality, and business objectives.​

This role works cross-functionally to drive CMC deliverables, manage external partners, and support global regulatory submissions.

## Key Responsibilities

CMC Strategy & Execution

- Contribute to the development and implementation of phase-appropriate CMC strategies​

- Support CMC activities for assigned programs from early development through late-stage clinical development

- Identify risks and develop mitigation strategies to ensure timelines and quality standards are met

Process & Analytical Development

- Support drug substance and drug product development activities

- Support analytical method development, validation, and specification setting

- Support process characterization, validation, and lifecycle management

Manufacturing & Tech Transfer

- Manage relationships with CDMOs and manufacturing partners

- Support technology transfer and scale-up activities

- Ensure compliance with GMP requirements

Regulatory Support

- Author, review, and contribute to CMC sections of regulatory submissions (IND, CTA, NDA, BLA)

- Support interactions with global regulatory authorities, including the U.S. Food and Drug Administration and the European Medicines Agency

- Address regulatory questions and inspection readiness activities

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Partner with Regulatory Affairs, Quality, Supply Chain, and Technical Operations teams

- Provide technical expertise to management team

- Support budget planning and timeline management for CMC activities

## Your Profile

- PhD, MSc, or equivalent degree in Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Sciences, Chemical Engineering, Biochemistry, or related scientific discipline.

- Typically 8-10 years of experience in pharmaceutical or biotechnology development.​

- Demonstrated experience in CMC development and regulatory submissions.​

- Experience managing external manufacturing partners preferred

- Strong scientific and technical expertise in CMC disciplines​

- Knowledge of global regulatory guidelines (ICH, GMP)​

- Project leadership and stakeholder management​

- Risk assessment and problem-solving skills​

- Excellent communication and organizational skills

Are you interested? We are looking forward to receiving your online application

## About CSL Behring

CSL Behring is a global biotherapeutics leader driven by our promise to save lives. Focused on serving patients’ needs by using the latest technologies, we discover, develop and deliver innovative therapies for people living with conditions in the immunology, hematology, cardiovascular and metabolic, respiratory, and transplant therapeutic areas. We use three strategic scientific platforms of plasma fractionation, recombinant protein technology, and cell and gene therapy to support continued innovation and continually refine ways in which products can address unmet medical needs and help patients lead full lives.

CSL Behring operates one of the world’s largest plasma collection networks, CSL Plasma. Our parent company, CSL, headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, employs 32,000 people, and delivers its lifesaving therapies to people in more than 100 countries.
To learn more about CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus and CSL Vifor visit https://www.csl.com/ and CSL Plasma at https://www.cslplasma.com/ .

## Our Benefits

For more information on CSL benefits visit How CSL Supports Your Well-being | CSL .

## You Belong at CSL

At CSL, Inclusion and Belonging is at the core of our mission and who we are. It fuels our innovation day in and day out. By celebrating our differences and creating a culture of curiosity and empathy, we are able to better understand and connect with

Utilizziamo tre piattaforme scientifiche strategiche di frazionamento del plasma, tecnologia delle proteine ricombinanti, e terapia cellulare e genica per supportare l'innovazione continua e perfezionare continuamente i modi in cui i prodotti possono affrontare bisogni medici non soddisfatti e aiutare i pazienti a condurre una vita piena. CSL Behring opera una delle più grandi reti di raccolta plasma del mondo, CSL Plasma. La nostra società madre, CSL, con sede a Melbourne, Australia, impiega 32.000 persone, e fornisce le sue terapie salvavita per le persone in più di 100 paesi. Per saperne di più su CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus e CSL Viper visita https://www.csl.com/ e CSL Plasma all'indirizzo https://www.cslplasma.com/ . - Partner with Regulatory Affairs, Quality, Supply Chain, and Technical Operations teams

- Provide technical expertise to management team

- Support budget planning and timeline management for CMC activities

Your Profile

- PhD, MSc, or equivalent degree in Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Sciences, Chemical Engineering, Biochemistry, or related scientific discipline.

- Typically 8-10 years of experience in pharmaceutical or biotechnology development.​

- Demonstrated experience in CMC development and regulatory submissions.​

- Experience managing external manufacturing partners preferred

- Strong scientific and technical expertise in CMC disciplines​

- Knowledge of global regulatory guidelines (ICH, GMP)​

- Project leadership and stakeholder management​

- Risk assessment and problem-solving skills​

- Excellent communication and organizational skills

Are you interested? We are looking forward to receiving your online application

About CSL Behring

CSL Behring is a global biotherapeutics leader driven by our promise to save lives. Focused on serving patients’ needs by using the latest technologies, we discover, develop and deliver innovative therapies for people living with conditions in the immunology, hematology, cardiovascular and metabolic, respiratory, and transplant therapeutic areas. We use three strategic scientific platforms of plasma fractionation, recombinant protein technology, and cell and gene therapy to support continued innovation and continually refine ways in which products can address unmet medical needs and help patients lead full lives.

CSL Behring operates one of the world’s largest plasma collection networks, CSL Plasma. Our parent company, CSL, headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, employs 32,000 people, and delivers its lifesaving therapies to people in more than 100 countries.
To learn more about CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus and CSL Vifor visit https://www.csl.com/ and CSL Plasma at https://www.cslplasma.com/ .

Our Benefits

You Belong at CSL

descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Le chercheur principal, CMC Science, est chargé d'appuyer et d'exécuter les stratégies de chimie, de fabrication et de contrôle (CMC) des produits pharmaceutiques et/ou biologiques tout au long du développement clinique et de la commercialisation précoce. Ce rôle garantit que les activités de développement des substances médicamenteuses et des produits pharmaceutiques répondent aux objectifs de réglementation, de qualité et d'affaires. Ce rôle fonctionne de façon interfonctionnelle pour stimuler les produits livrables du MCC, gérer les partenaires externes et appuyer les présentations réglementaires mondiales. Principales responsabilités Stratégie et exécution du CMC - Contribuer à l'élaboration et à la mise en oeuvre de stratégies de CMC adaptées à la phase - Appuyer les activités du CMC pour les programmes assignés, depuis l'élaboration précoce jusqu'au développement clinique en fin d'étape - Identifier les risques et élaborer des stratégies d'atténuation pour s'assurer que les délais et les normes de qualité sont respectés Processus et développement analytique - Appuyer les activités de développement de substances médicamenteuses et de produits pharmaceutiques - Appuyer l'élaboration de méthodes d'analyse, la validation et l'établissement de spécifications - Soutenir la caractérisation, la validation et la gestion du cycle de vie du processus Fabrication et transfert de technologie - Gérer les relations avec les ORDM et les partenaires manufacturiers - Soutenir le transfert de technologie et les activités de mise à l'échelle - Assurer la conformité aux exigences des BPF Soutien réglementaire - Auteur, examen et contribution aux sections des présentations réglementaires du CMC (IND, CTA, NDA, BLA) - Soutenir les interactions avec les autorités réglementaires mondiales, y compris l'Administration des aliments et des médicaments des États-Unis et l'Agence européenne des médicaments - Répondre aux questions de réglementation et aux activités de préparation aux inspections Collaboration interfonctionnelle - - Expérience de la gestion de partenaires de fabrication externes préférée - Forte expertise scientifique et technique dans les disciplines du CMC - Connaissance des lignes directrices de réglementation mondiale (ICH, BPF) - Leadership de projet et gestion des intervenants - Évaluation des risques et compétences en résolution de problèmes - Excellente communication et compétences organisationnelles Ça t'intéresse ? jobs.title: Director, Analytical Strategy
jobs.description:
For our global Technical Operations Organization, we are currently looking for a

Director, Analytical Strategy

The Director, Analytical Strategy is a senior scientific and strategic leadership role responsible for designing and overseeing analytical strategies that support drug discovery, development, and regulatory approval. This position ensures robust, compliant, and innovative analytical approaches across preclinical, clinical programs and LCM.

## Key Responsibilities

## Strategic Leadership

- Develop and lead the global analytical strategy aligned with program and corporate goals​
- Provide scientific and regulatory guidance for analytical plans across all development phases (discovery → post-marketing)​
- Drive innovation in analytical technologies, platforms, and workflows​
- Represent analytical function in cross-functional governance and decision-making forums

## Scientific Oversight

- Oversee development, validation, and implementation of analytical methods (e.g., LC-MS/MS, ligand binding assays, biomarkers, immunogenicity)​
- Ensure high-quality data generation for PK, PD, biomarker, and immunogenicity studies​
- Review and approve analytical study designs, reports, and regulatory documentation​
- Troubleshoot complex scientific and technical challenges

## Regulatory & Compliance

- Ensure compliance with global regulatory guidelines (FDA, EMA, ICH, GLP, GCP)​
- Lead analytical sections of regulatory submissions (IND, CTA, NDA, BLA, MAA)​
- Interface with regulatory agencies and respond to health authority queries​
- Maintain inspection readiness and quality standards

## Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Partner with Clinical Pharmacology, DMPK, Toxicology, Biomarkers, and Clinical Operations​
- Support translational strategy and dose selection decisions​
- Manage external CROs, academic collaborators, and technology vendors

## Leadership & Management

- Lead and mentor analytical scientists and project leaders​
- Manage budgets, timelines, and resource allocation​
- Build and scale analytical capabilities and infrastructure

## Your experience

- PhD in analytical Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Sciences, Biochemistry, or related field (or MSc with extensive experience)
- Typically, 12–15+ years in bioanalysis within biotech, pharma, or CRO environments ​
- Deep expertise in LC-MS/MS, ligand binding assays, biomarkers, and immunogenicity testing ​
- Strong knowledge of regulatory requirements and analytical validation standards ​
- Proven leadership and strategic program experience ​
- Experience supporting regulatory submissions and health authority interactions

## Contatto

Are you interested? We are looking forward to receiving your online application.

## About CSL Behring

CSL Behring is a global biotherapeutics leader driven by our promise to save lives. Focused on serving patients’ needs by using the latest technologies, we discover, develop and deliver innovative therapies for people living with conditions in the immunology, hematology, cardiovascular and metabolic, respiratory, and transplant therapeutic areas. We use three strategic scientific platforms of plasma fractionation, recombinant protein technology, and cell and gene therapy to support continued innovation and continually refine ways in which products can address unmet medical needs and help patients lead full lives.

CSL Behring operates one of the world’s largest plasma collection networks, CSL Plasma. Our parent company, CSL, headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, employs 32,000 people, and delivers its lifesaving therapies to people in more than 100 countries.
To learn more about CSL, CSL Behring, CSL Seqirus and CSL Vifor visit https://www.csl.com/ and CSL Plasma at https://www.cslplasma.com/ .

## Our Benefits

For more information on CSL benefits visit How CSL Supports Your Well-being | CSL .

## You Belong at CSL

At CSL, Inclusion and Belonging is at the core of our mission and who we are. It fuels our innovation day in and day out. By celebrating our dif

Questa posizione garantisce approcci analitici robusti, conformi e innovativi attraverso programmi clinici preclinici e LCM. Leadership strategica - Sviluppare e guidare la strategia analitica globale allineata con obiettivi di programma e aziendali - Fornire indicazioni scientifiche e regolamentari per piani analitici in tutte le fasi di sviluppo (scoprire → post-marketing) - Guidare l'innovazione in tecnologie analitiche, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro - Rappresentare la funzione analitica in governance interfunzionale e decision-making forum Scientific Oversight - supervisionare lo sviluppo, la convalida e l'implementazione di metodi analitici (e). - Valutazione e approvazione di progetti di studio analitico, report e documentazione normativa - Risolvere complesse sfide scientifiche e tecniche Normativa & Compliance - Assicurare il rispetto delle linee guida normative globali (FDA, EMA, ICH, GLP, GCP) - Lead sezioni analitiche delle sottomissioni normative (IND, CTA, NDA, BLA, MAA) - Interfaccia con le agenzie di regolamentazione e rispondere alle domande dell'autorità sanitaria - Promuovere la prontezza dell'ispezione e gli standard di qualità Siamo lieti di ricevere la vostra applicazione online. CSL Behring CSL Behring è un leader globale di biotherapeutics guidato dalla nostra promessa di salvare vite umane. Concentrati sulle esigenze dei pazienti utilizzando le più recenti tecnologie, scopriamo, sviluppiamo e forniamo terapie innovative per le persone che vivono con condizioni di immunologia, ematologia, cardiovascolare e metabolica, respiratoria e trapianto aree terapeutiche. Utilizziamo tre piattaforme scientifiche strategiche di frazionamento del plasma, tecnologia delle proteine ricombinanti, e terapia cellulare e genica per supportare l'innovazione continua e perfezionare continuamente i modi in cui i prodotti possono affrontare bisogni medici non soddisfatti e aiutare i pazienti a condurre una vita piena. CSL Behring opera una delle più grandi reti di raccolta plasma del mondo, CSL Plasma.
